mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sports ORDER BY sportId
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sports( name, category, isActive ) VALUES( #{name}, #{category}, COALESCE(#{isActive},true) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sports WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sports WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) AND sportId != #{sportId}
